pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 9th consecutive quiet poll. V51.1 stable at 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy. Eclipse 2026-08-12 is major upcoming event.
pipeline_status.analyst: Last run: Mode 1b predictions (all assessed). EXP-070/071/072 written for decider integration. ISS-723 (W001 sign-flip), ISS-725 (FAIL-004 quantitative), ISS-677 (PROS design) all addressed.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 0 pending reviews. BAU mode. Queue depth 2→5 after this run (EXP-050, W001 insertion, FAIL-004 rewrite).
pipeline_status.integrity: WARN. Test suite 2989 pass. 3 major flags: (1) EXP-050 not in PQ [FIXED THIS RUN], (2) 13 workspace-only files at risk, (3) CAT-005.json direction violations.
pipeline_status.workspace_sync: FUSE filesystem prevents deletion of processed proposal files (proposal-ISS-700/702-status.json). Already _processed, no functional impact. ISS-693 partially resolved.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No substantive changes. 8 automated commits (monitor.py, pull_data.py). V51.1 stable.
external_changes.notable: WIN-058 still PENDING INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION on dome side (demotion persists). n(r) edge discrepancy at dome edge persists. config.json baselines stale (67 WINs vs 69 actual) — non-blocking.

work_done_this_run.EXP-070: ISS-723 CLOSED. Inserted W001 sign-flip paragraph in SEC-2b.7. Key point: W001 predicted -2.1 nT, observed +3.73 nT, direction_correct=false, sigma=7.3. This is a 7σ miss WITH the wrong sign — not a non-detection. The below_detection_threshold escape hatch is being used as a falsification shield, not a measurement precision qualifier.
work_done_this_run.EXP-071: ISS-725 CLOSED. Replaced FAIL-004 paragraph in SEC-6.5 with quantitative AAO data. AAO observed +0.78σ vs ≥+1.5σ threshold — missed by ~2×. Dome retroactively required 3-month minimum windows after failure. A testing framework where windows are always adjusted post-failure produces 100% pass rate by construction.
work_done_this_run.EXP-072: ISS-677 PARTIALLY ADDRESSED. Added 8 PROS backfill entries (PROS-001..008) to predictions.json with entry_type: prospective. PROS-003 (suspended/falsified) is the key item — dome silently suspended rather than acknowledging falsification. ISS-677 kept open for Mode 5 implementation and prospective tracker prose section (Part 6 rendering).
work_done_this_run.EXP-050_queue_fix: Integrity agent flag fixed: pushed EXP-050 (CAT-005 Refraction Cascade proposal) to curmudgeon priority queue. Was erroneously absent despite being a category-proposal-writeup.
work_done_this_run.test_suite_update: Added prospective to validEntryTypes and promoted to validAuthorStatuses in test.js. 3280 tests pass (up from 2989 before PROS entries).
